description: The `Taskbar` DSC resource is used to manage Windows taskbar settings.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `Taskbar` DSC resource is used to manage Windows taskbar settings.

Alignment.title: Alignment
Alignment.description:
Sets the taskbar alignment. Accepted values are `Left` or `Middle`.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

HideLabelsMode.title: HideLabelsMode
HideLabelsMode.description:
Sets the taskbar button label hide behavior. Accepted values are `Always`, `WhenFull`, or `Never`.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

SearchboxMode.title: SearchboxMode
SearchboxMode.description:
Sets the search box display mode. Accepted values are `Hide`, `ShowIconOnly`, `SearchBox`, or `ShowIconAndLabel`.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

TaskViewButton.title: TaskViewButton
TaskViewButton.description:
Shows or hides the Task View button on the taskbar.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

WidgetsButton.title: WidgetsButton
WidgetsButton.description:
Shows or hides the Widgets button on the taskbar.
        Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

RestartExplorer.title: RestartExplorer
RestartExplorer.description: Specifies whether to restart Windows Explorer to apply changes. Defaults to `$false`.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/Taskbar
